name: Oversized Camel Wool Coat
description: Luxuriously oversized wool-blend coat in classic camel. Double-breasted silhouette with notched lapels and wide sleeves. A true wardrobe anchor that works with everything from tailored trousers to wide-leg denim.

name: Mini Le Chiquito Bag
description: The iconic micro bag in buttery smooth leather. Structured baguette shape with a top handle and removable crossbody strap. Available in multiple colorways. Statement piece, always.

name: Tabis Split-Toe Ballet Flats
description: The unmistakable Tabi split-toe silhouette in supple leather. Low kitten heel, almond toe, and that signature cloven hoof finish. Equal parts avant-garde and wearable.

name: Cargo Wide-Leg Trousers
description: Relaxed wide-leg trousers in a heavy cotton twill. Utility-inspired with side cargo pockets, an elasticated waist, and a clean draped hem. Wear low and loose.

name: Ribbed Cashmere Tank
description: Ultra-fine ribbed cashmere tank in a slim, elongated silhouette. Subtle scoop neck, clean edges — no branding, just quality. Tuck into high-waist skirts or layer under coats.

name: Chain-Link Layered Necklace
description: Chunky sterling silver chain with an oxidized finish. Substantial weight, architectural links. Goes as well with a silk slip as it does a leather jacket.
